menuItems.name: Rose Gold Glazed Chiffon Cake
menuItems.description: Light as air chiffon cake soaked in rosewater syrup, iced with blush pink buttercream and topped with 24k gold leaf flakes.

menuItems.name: Rosewater & Raspberry Macarons
menuItems.description: Delicate almond shells filled with an organic rosewater-infused white chocolate ganache and fresh raspberry compote core. (Box of 6)

menuItems.name: Flaky Rose Gold Croissant
menuItems.description: 81 layers of hand-laminated French butter pastry, baked golden brown and finished with a shimmer of edible copper-rose gold luster.

menuItems.name: Blush Velvet Cupcake
menuItems.description: Moist velvet cake base dyed naturally with beetroot juice, topped with high-swirl cream cheese frosting and sugar rose petals.

menuItems.name: Rose Gold Cappuccino
menuItems.description: Double espresso shot brewed with single-origin beans, steamed milk infused with rose-extract, finished with a gold dust stencil.

menuItems.name: Chocolate Blackberry Luxury Cake
menuItems.description: Decadent dark chocolate sponge layered with blackberry reduction and dark cocoa ganache, decorated with purple orchid blooms.

menuItems.name: Pistachio Blush Brioche
menuItems.description: Rich egg-and-butter enriched dough filled with sweet Sicilian pistachio cream and coated in pink sugar glaze.

menuItems.name: Sparkling Rose Tea Infusion
menuItems.description: Iced herbal white tea steeped with organic rose hips, hibiscus flowers, and carbonated for a refreshing floral bubbly finish.
